data_source: AI-Estimated (Llama 3.3 70B inference from web context — not official statistics)

exporters.notes: South Africa contributes over 40% of the world's chrome supply
Glencore is one of the world's largest diversified natural resource companies and a dominant force in the chrome ore market, primarily through its operations in South Africa and Kazakhstan
Glencore is thought to be in negotiations with a consortium of Asian, mostly Chinese, mills to purchase its ferroalloy assets

importers.notes: China is a major consumer of chromium ore, with a significant demand for the metal in its steel industry
India is another major consumer of chromium ore, with a significant demand for the metal in its steel industry
Japan is a significant consumer of chromium ore, with a demand for the metal in its steel industry and other industrial applications
South Korea is a significant consumer of chromium ore, with a demand for the metal in its steel industry and other industrial applications
The United States is a significant consumer of chromium ore, with a demand for the metal in its steel industry and other industrial applications
